form.formComment: Solid performance after tracking the speed to win by one length at this track over 390m (22.07) beating Affiliated in Restricted WIN H on April 1. Expected to go well again.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Charged out of the boxes with a fast early split and led for much of the way before being grabbed late, finishing a one length second at this track over 390m in 22.12. Ran one of the fastest times on the program last start despite finishing in the minors. Pay to follow.

form.formComment: Last start finished 4th over 390m at this track beaten 7 lengths (22.55) behind Mighty Miss in a Restricted WIN H on April 1. Has the ability to take this out.

form.formComment: Found the going tougher last start when third over 390m at this track. That followed a win two back in 19.59 beating Highgate Franky over 350m at Healesville. Hard to have without further improvement.

form.formComment: Big odds last time but gave a huge sight after a fast early split, grabbed late but holding on to a placing when a 1.3 lengths second (22.29) over 390m at this track. Solid chance with even luck.
